Layout.tagline: © 2026 Smart Apply. Germany first, trust always.

TrustStrip.message: We never auto-apply on your behalf. Every application requires your explicit approval before it is sent.

ThemeHint.message: You're viewing the terminal theme by default — use the toggle at top right to switch to light, dark, or your system setting.

Landing.heroHeading: The AI job-search copilot that optimizes for trust, not volume.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Most job tools flood you with duplicates and scam listings, then auto-apply blindly to hit a number. Smart Apply filters smarter first — deduplicated, scam-checked, high-confidence matches — and never submits an application without your explicit approval.
Landing.heroFootnote: Free forever for your first 5 matched jobs. No credit card required.
Landing.step1Body: Or paste it as text — takes seconds.
Landing.step2Body: Target role, country, language, seniority, remote preference.
Landing.step3Body: Top trusted German roles, match reasoning, and one tailored draft — in under 5 minutes.
Landing.pillar1Body: We pull roles from Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Teamtailor, SuccessFactors and vetted German job boards — not scraped inboxes.
Landing.pillar2Body: The same role never shows up twice under five different sources. One canonical listing, always.
Landing.pillar3Body: Every listing carries a visible trust and scam-risk signal, so you can judge for yourself before you invest a minute.
Landing.pillar4Body: We draft tailored CVs and cover letters. You review them. Nothing gets submitted without your explicit approval.
Landing.finalCtaBody: Upload your CV, answer five short questions, and get trusted German job matches today.

JobDetail.pdfDownloadError: Could not download the application packet.
JobDetail.approvalError: Could not submit this for approval.
JobDetail.highRiskBody: This listing shows signs commonly associated with scams: unrealistic salary for the role, vague or urgent-sounding description, upfront payment or personal-document requests, and off-platform contact methods. We still show it so you can judge for yourself, but we recommend not proceeding, and never send money or ID documents to an employer before you have a signed contract.
JobDetail.notEnoughRoles: Not seeing enough roles like this?
JobDetail.interviewPrepHint: Likely interview questions and talking points for this role, generated from your profile. Available any time - no need to wait until you've applied.
JobDetail.reviewCarefullyNote: Review carefully — you'll need to explicitly approve this in the application queue before anything is considered "applied".

Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.versionNotice: Version 1.0 · Placeholder text pending review by qualified legal counsel before this product is offered to real users. Do not treat this page as final legal text.
Terms.section1Body: Smart Apply ("we", "us") provides a job search and AI-assisted CV/cover-letter tailoring platform focused on the German job market. By creating an account you enter into a contract with us for use of the service on the terms below.
Terms.section2Body: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account.
Terms.section3Body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity under your account. Tell us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.
Terms.section4Body: Tailored CVs, cover letters, and other documents we generate for you are drafted by an AI model based on the profile and CV information you provide. We instruct the model not to invent facts, but you are responsible for reviewing every generated document for accuracy before sending it to an employer.
Terms.section5Body: We aggregate job listings from third-party sources and apply automated trust/risk scoring, but we cannot guarantee that every listing is accurate, current, or legitimate. Use your own judgment before applying or sharing personal documents with any employer.
Terms.section6Body: You may stop using the service and delete your account at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or misuse the service.
Terms.section7Body: If we materially change these terms, we will ask existing users to review and accept the updated version. Each acceptance is recorded with the version and date, so we can always show what you agreed to and when.
Terms.contactPlaceholder: [Operator legal name and contact details - see Impressum]

Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.versionNotice: Version 1.0 · Placeholder text pending review by qualified legal counsel before this product is offered to real users. Do not treat this page as final legal text.
Privacy.section1Body: Account details (email, password hash), your candidate profile (target role, seniority, location preference, skills, salary expectations), CV documents you upload and the structured information we extract from them, job search activity, and the applications and drafts you generate.
Privacy.section2Body: To operate your account and match you with relevant jobs (performance of our contract with you, GDPR Art. 6(1)(b)), and to keep the service secure and improve match quality (our legitimate interest, GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)).
Privacy.section3Body: To parse your CV and generate tailored CVs, cover letters, and other drafts, relevant profile and job data is sent to our AI subprocessor(s) — Anthropic (Anthropic PBC, USA) and/or OpenRouter, depending on configuration. Payment processing (Pro subscriptions) is handled by Stripe. Where a subprocessor is located outside the EU/EEA, transfer relies on Standard Contractual Clauses or an equivalent adequacy mechanism (e.g. the EU-US Data Privacy Framework, where the subprocessor participates).
Privacy.section4Body: We keep your account and profile data for as long as your account is active, and CV documents/generated drafts until you delete them or close your account, after which they are deleted within a reasonable period except where we are required to retain records for longer (e.g. billing records).
Privacy.section5Body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your data, and to object to or restrict certain processing. Contact us (see Impressum) to exercise these rights, or to withdraw any optional consent (e.g. marketing communications) at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
Privacy.section6Body: When you accept these terms and this policy, we record the version accepted and a timestamp in an append-only log, so we can demonstrate what you agreed to even after this text is later updated.
Privacy.contactPlaceholder: [Operator legal name and contact details - see Impressum]

Impressum.heading: Impressum
Impressum.versionNotice: Placeholder pending the operator's real registration details - required under German law (§ 5 Digitale-Dienste-Gesetz / TMG) for any commercially operated website reachable in Germany. Do not treat this page as final legal text.
Impressum.registerPlaceholder: [Commercial register, registration number, and VAT ID (USt-IdNr.), if applicable]

Admin.noAccessError: You don't have access to this page — it requires an admin account.
Admin.pageSubtitle: Crawl run history and success rate per job source, over each source's last 20 runs.
Admin.alertsHint: Manually-invokable only — checks every active saved search for new matches and emails owners. No standing scheduler runs this automatically yet.
Admin.alertsResult: Checked {searchesChecked, plural, one {# active saved search} other {# active saved searches}} · sent {emailsSent, plural, one {# email} other {# emails}} · {jobsMatched, plural, one {# new job} other {# new jobs}} matched
Admin.modelOverrideHint: Type any OpenRouter model slug (free or paid, e.g. "openai/gpt-oss-120b:free" or "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5") to test it immediately — no redeploy needed. Only takes effect when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is the active provider; leave blank to fall back to the deployed default.
Admin.modelUsingDefault: No override set — using the deployed default model.
Admin.modelSavedMessage: Saved — now using {model} for every AI call.
Admin.modelClearedMessage: Override cleared — back to the deployed default.
Admin.modelSaveError: Could not save that model override.
